steps.t: Discrediting notices can be found around Lake-town. You should find and remove any slanderous notices that you come across.
Suspicious characters can be found around Lake-town. You should find suspicious characters in Lake-town who look to be putting up the slanderous notic…
Someone in Lake-town is bribing people to spread rumours. You should find the briber.
The briber in Lake-town has accidentally left a trail of coins behind him. You should follow the trail of coins to catch the briber.
You should examine what you noticed lying near the defeated Easterling, Utûkel, in Lake-town's underbelly.
